NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ZUBICARAY, PABLO IND& DBA THIRSTY BEAR BREWING CO.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY F. FERRANDO & CO., A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT ZUBICARAY, PABLO IND& DBA THIRSTY BEAR BREWING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25053, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-26-1997, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-12-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF F. FERRANDO & CO., A CALIFORNIA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUBICARAY, PABLO IND& DBA THIRSTY BEAR BREWING CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF F. FERRANDO & CO., A CALIFORNIA CORP. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZUBICARAY, PABLO IND& DBA THIRSTY BEAR BREWING CO. PLTFF. TO PAY DEFEND. $71 COST. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 25053 ON 5-21-97. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
